title: KinertCraft
description: Nice mix of industry, engineering, exploration, adventure, combat, weapons and armor and economy.
body:
Modpack description:

Nice mix of industry, engineering, exploration, adventure, combat, weapons and armor and economy. Made for the Craft'A'Holics SMP.

##  What does this project add? What features does it have?

### 🌍 World
The modpack significantly expands the Minecraft world, introducing new dimensions, biomes, structures, and environmental features:

Dimensions & Biomes: Mods like Ad Astra, BetterEnd, BetterNether, Deeper and Darker, and The Twilight Forest Unofficial add new realms and enhance existing ones, offering diverse landscapes and challenges.

Structures & Dungeons: With Roguelike Dungeons, YUNG's Better Dungeons, YUNG's Better Mineshafts, and YUNG's Better Strongholds, the world is populated with intricate structures and dungeons to explore.

Environmental Enhancements: Naturalist, Hybrid Aquatic, and More Mob Variants enrich the ecosystem with new flora, fauna, and ambient details.

Navigation & Mapping: Xaero's World Map and Waystones improve exploration by providing detailed maps and fast travel options.

### ⚙️ Industry
The industrial aspect of this modpack is robust, primarily driven by the Create mod and its numerous add-ons:

Mechanical Engineering: Create and its extensions (Create: Big Cannons, Create: Steam 'n' Rails, Create: Modular Tools, etc.) allow for complex machinery, automation, and transportation systems.

Resource Processing: Mods like Create: Ore Excavation, Create: Molten Metals, and Create: Sifting Fabric streamline resource gathering and processing.

Energy & Power: Create: Nucleacar and Create: Lazy Engines introduce advanced power generation methods.

Storage & Logistics: Tom's Simple Storage Mod and Create: Trading Floor enhance inventory management and trading systems.

### 🛡️ Gameplay
Gameplay is diversified with RPG elements, combat enhancements, and quality-of-life improvements:

RPG Elements: The RPG Series mods (Archers, Berserker, Paladins & Priests, etc.) introduce new classes, abilities, and progression systems.

Combat Enhancements: Better Combat, Combat Roll, and Marium's Soulslike Weaponry refine combat mechanics, offering a more dynamic experience.

Magic & Spells: Elemental Wizards, Spell Engine, and Spell Power Attributes add magical abilities and spellcasting systems.

Exploration & Quests: Bountiful and AdventureZ provide quests and adventure opportunities, encouraging exploration and goal-oriented gameplay.

Customization & Building: Chisel Reborn, Litematica, and Supplementaries offer tools for detailed building and customization.


A full list of all mods in the modpack can be found at the bottom of this page.

##  Whats the appeal?

This modpack is meant to bring together a ragtag group of friends with vastly different wants and needs for modded Minecraft gaming. Do you have friends who want to roam the world, find and raid dungeons, fight bosses, and get better and more advanced weaponry? Or are they more builder-types who enjoy building beautiful environments, constructing buildings, and adding detail? Perhaps they like automation and industry, or magic, or food? All these needs are met—and more.

## Environment Information:

This modpack instance is entirely built for 1.20.1 client use. The server instance might not be releasing any time soon.
